name: YARA Scanner
description: Scan a file or directory with YARA rules (classic yara or the newer yara-x). Ships a small high-signal starter rule pack; point --rules at a real corpus (YARA-Rules, signature-base, your own) for serious coverage. Read-only — matches patterns, never runs the target. Prereq-gated on the yara CLI with honest degradation.

prerequisites.install_hint: Install yara (https://virustotal.github.io/yara/) or yara-x (https://virustotal.github.io/yara-x/) and put it on PATH.

safety.notes: Trusted matcher (yara) over untrusted bytes — pattern matching only, never execution. Timeout-bounded. (Rules can invoke modules; the bundled starter pack uses only strings/hex/regex.)

payload.note: BYO yara/yara-x CLI on PATH (native tool; not bundled). We DO bundle a starter rule pack (rules/starter.yar): embedded/base64 PE, UPX, PHP webshell, Windows exec/download cradle, curl|sh. Bring a full corpus via --rules. Dispatcher prereq gate = honest degradation.
